import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if not line: continue
    obj = json.loads\(line\)
    if obj.get\('result',{}\).get\('tools'\):
        tools = obj['result']['tools']
        bridge = [t['name'] for t in tools if t['name'].startswith\('tars_'\)]
        print\(f'Total tools: {len\(tools\)}'\)
        print\(f'Bridge tools: {bridge}'\)
")

    {'patternKind': 'TreeOfThoughts', 'goal': 'explore approaches to refactor the event system', 'success': False, 'durationMs': 20000, 'timestamp': '2026-03-10T13:00:00Z'},
    {'patternKind': 'TreeOfThoughts', 'goal': 'brainstorm solutions for the caching problem', 'success': False, 'durationMs': 22000, 'timestamp': '2026-03-10T14:00:00Z'},
    {'patternKind': 'GraphOfThoughts', 'goal': 'compare microservice vs monolith architectures', 'success': True, 'durationMs': 5000, 'timestamp': '2026-03-10T15:00:00Z'},
    {'patternKind': 'GraphOfThoughts', 'goal': 'analyze tradeoffs between SQL and NoSQL', 'success': True, 'durationMs': 4500, 'timestamp': '2026-03-10T16:00:00Z'},
    {'patternKind': 'ReAct', 'goal': 'search for performance bottlenecks in the API', 'success': False, 'durationMs': 16000, 'timestamp': '2026-03-11T09:00:00Z'},
    {'patternKind': 'ChainOfThought', 'goal': 'explain the observer pattern', 'success': True, 'durationMs': 800, 'timestamp': '2026-03-11T10:00:00Z'},

Bash(cat /c/Users/spare/.tars/pattern_outcomes.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total outcomes: {len\(data\)}'\)
by_goal = {}
for o in data:
    g = o['goal']
    by_goal.setdefault\(g, {'pass':0,'fail':0}\)
    if o['success']:
        by_goal[g]['pass'] += 1
    else:
        by_goal[g]['fail'] += 1
for g, r in sorted\(by_goal.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1]['fail'], reverse=True\):
    total = r['pass']+r['fail']
    rate = r['fail']/total*100
    print\(f'  {g}: {r[\\"fail\\"]}/{total} fail \({rate:.0f}%\)'\)
")

Bash(cat /c/Users/spare/.tars/pattern_outcomes.json | python -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Total outcomes: {len\(data\)}'\)
by_goal = {}
for o in data:
    g = o['goal']
    by_goal.setdefault\(g, {'p':0,'f':0}\)
    if o['success']:
        by_goal[g]['p'] += 1
    else:
        by_goal[g]['f'] += 1
for g, r in sorted\(by_goal.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1]['f'], reverse=True\):
    total = r['p']+r['f']
    rate = r['f']/total*100
    print\(f'  {g}: {r[\\"f\\"]}/{total} fail \({rate:.0f}%\)'\)
")
